message:
test(labruntime): port 21 export tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port all 21 #[tokio::test] async tests from export.rs to the asupersync
RuntimeFixture pattern. Covers: segment export, redaction, pane filtering,
pretty format, audit actor/action filters, gaps, events, sessions,
reservations, workflows with step logs, schema validation, header
version and timestamp checks, and empty-DB edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
